title: vrsn config file
description: configuration file to set default options for vrsn commands.

files.description: List of version files to operate on, all of which must contain the same version. Takes precedence over the --file flag and applies to both the bump and check commands.

verbose.description: If you want to show verbose output when running vrsn commands.

commit.description: If the bump command should automatically commit the edited version file.

commit-msg.description: The commit message to use when the bump command commits the version file. Supports Go template syntax with the {{.Version}} variable which resolves to the new version.

git-tag.description: If the bump command should use git tags rather than a version file.

tag-msg.description: The message to use when adding the git tag. Supports Go template syntax with the {{.Version}} variable which resolves to the new version.

base-branch.description: The name of the base branch if it's anything other than main.
